## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about?

## Mockups / References
Links, screenshots, or inspiration sites.

## Additional context
Anything else we should know?
